{{Quote|Do you feel lucky, alien scum?|Vytor Shrike|<ref name="TM" />}}
'''Vytor Shrike''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[Findsman/Legends|findsman]] who was active on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. In appearance he resembled [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], and may have dressed to capitalize on the similarities in order to get more clients.

==Biography==
[[File:Shrike.jpg|thumb|left|178px|Vytor Shrike]]
Shrike eventually left his trade to join a group of freedom fighters led by [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. He was incredibly loyal to Tallon and became Tallon's first officer aboard the [[Battalion (Praetor-class)|''Battalion'']]. Shrike was also instrumental in staging Tallon's [[Death/Legends|death]] to divert attention from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

After leaving Tallon's service, Shrike stayed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where he eventually became restless. To satisfy his adventurous spirit, Shrike had a brief stint as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] Shrike learned that a large [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] had been placed on Tallon's head. Although Shrike now felt only loyal to himself, he [[Escape from Tatooine|returned]] to Tatooine to help his former commander.

==Equipment==
Vytor Shrike equipped a heavy set of body [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that contained, among other things, his wide array of weapons. Shrike was usually equipped with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and four [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenades]]. Along with his weapons, Shrike had a [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] and a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] strapped around his neck. Also, as with other [[Breather Gand|breathing]] [[Gand/Legends|Gands]], Shrike was forced to wear a protective suit and [[Breath mask/Legends|respirator]] outside of his [[Gand (planet)/Legends|home planet]].
